<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create Application Revision"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/applications/revisions/"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Create and commit the initial revision for an application variant.

Advanced use only. For normal development loops prefer
`POST /applications/revisions/commit`, which commits the new revision
as the variant's tip and assigns a version number.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>

</Heading>
